expectations.text: plan.md file exists and is non-trivial (>500 chars)
Plan contains a recommended /bal-converge command on a copy-pasteable line
expectations.evidence: matched: /bal-converge kpi="Dur 180~240 AND Lvl>=5" N=5 max_iter=3

expectations.text: Recommended command includes a kpi= argument
Plan references the prior converge report history (mentions max_iter or a prior report timestamp/reason)
Plan surfaces at least one memory trap (enemy_damage int round-trip OR Ghost burst spawn / structural cutoff)
expectations.evidence: enemy_damage round-trip; Ghost burst / structural cutoff

expectations.text: Knob whitelist section references actual knob ids from .claude/bal-apply.json (e.g. enemy_damage, spawn_rate, level_up_xp_increment) — not invented names
Plan does NOT claim /bal-converge was executed (single-pass guarantee)
